challenge.explanation:
Da biste pronašli tačan odgovor, obratite pažnju na to kako Brajan opisuje izazove u komunikaciji tima. Posebno obratite pažnju na ono što kaže nakon Communication with the external team was difficult at first, but...

On kaže da je komunikacija u početku bila teška, ali se poboljšala nakon što je tim počeo da održava redovne sastanke za pregled sa spoljnim timom.
challenge.instructions: Pročitaj tekst i odgovori na pitanje ispod.

questions.text:
Mesec dana nakon njihovog razgovora, Brian je poslao imejl Sarah:

Hi Sarah,

I hope you're doing well. I wanted to update you on our software development project.

We decided to build the core parts in-house and outsource the rest. This has worked well. The in-house team has stronger control, while outsourcing has made things faster.

There were some challenges. Communication with the external team was difficult at first, but regular check-ins helped. Our team also needed more support, so we reassigned some resources.

Overall, this approach is more reliable than full outsourcing because we control key parts while saving time. However, we are still improving our process.

Thanks again for your suggestion! Let's catch up soon.

Best,

Brian

Šta je pomoglo da se poboljša komunikacija sa spoljnim timom?

answers.answer: Mikutano ya mara kwa mara ya ukaguzi.
Kusitisha utoaji wa kazi kwa watu wa nje.
answers.feedback: Timu iliendelea kutoa baadhi ya zoezi kwa watu wa nje, si kusitisha kabisa.
Barua pepe haikutaja kuajiri wasanidi programu wapya.
U imejlu se ne pominje prilagođavanje rasporeda kao način rešavanja problema u komunikaciji.

challenge.title: Vežba 146
